# Focus Keeper: Study Time Timer · Productivity

## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 14, 2026 - May 22, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _betteighboop_, May 22, 2026, 1/5: "I reinstalled this timer to get some work done and it no longer does what I want it to do. It gave me a long unskippable questionnaire about my ability to focus and I can’t even find the basic timer anymore. (25 on, 5 off x4) That is the only feature I am interested in. And I’m not looking for a subscription payment. Also, the app’s been buggy. Last time I was actually able to access the timer, the live activities timer on the homescreen wouldn’t update consistently."
            2. _Hsovslcoshvwkdhg_, May 14, 2026, 3/5: "This hurts a bit to type out because obviously a lot of love and different features have been put into this app, but unfortunately it doesn’t do the “Pomodoro Timer” part very well. The timer widget on my home screen constantly gets stuck/frozen, and the app crashes a lot in the background for seemingly no reason. All of the other features are cool, but if I can’t use the main one, what’s the point?"
